home.statsTitle: ERS SA is much more than megawatts
home.statsSubtitle: Concrete results transforming Senegal's energy landscape
home.statsCo2: Tonnes of CO₂ avoided per year
home.aboutText: Founded in 2013, Energy Resources Sénégal SA (ERS SA) is a Senegalese private company specializing in the development and operation of renewable energy solutions. Our ambition is to become a leading regional player in the energy transition in West Africa.
home.aboutExtra: The first independent power producer (IPP) 100% owned by Senegalese nationals, ERS SA is a pioneer in developing solar power plants coupled with battery storage in Senegal.
home.projectsSubtitle: Concrete projects transforming the energy landscape of Senegal
home.quoteText: Our ambition is to make Senegal a leader in the energy transition in West Africa, creating lasting value for our communities.
home.bubbleTitle: Your project is unique, so are your energy needs… and we get it.
home.bubbleSubtitle: Our tailor-made and cost-competitive solutions combine solar, wind and battery storage technologies to meet your challenges.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to invest in sustainable energy?
home.ctaSubtitle: Whether you're an investor, technical or institutional partner, we'd love to hear from you.

about.title: About ERS SA
about.subtitle: A committed player in Senegal's energy transition
about.historySubtitle: From inception in 2013 to an ambitious project portfolio
about.historyIntro: Founded in 2013, Energy Resources Sénégal (ERS) was born from the desire to actively contribute to the development of the energy sector in Senegal and West Africa.
about.historyParagraph2: From its very beginning, the company positioned itself as a committed player in the production and management of energy projects, with a strong focus on renewable energy. Through structuring projects such as the Kahone solar power plant, ERS has demonstrated its expertise and its ability to address today's energy challenges.
about.historyParagraph3: Over the years, ERS has consolidated its presence and expanded its activities, with the ambition of contributing sustainably to the transformation of the regional energy landscape.
about.timeline2013: Foundation of Energy Resources Sénégal SA with the vision of developing renewable energy projects in Senegal.
about.timeline2016: Launch of the Kahone solar power plant development. First institutional and technical partnerships established.
about.timeline2018: Commissioning of the Kahone solar power plant (20 MWp). Signing of the power purchase agreement with SENELEC.
about.timeline2021: Creation of the subsidiary Teranga Niakhar Storage SA. Start of the development of the combined solar and storage project.
about.timeline2024: Progress on the Teranga Niakhar Storage project (30 MWp + BESS 15 MW / 45 MWh). Heading towards the 500 MW target by 2030.
about.missionSubtitle: The baobab tree — a symbol of our rootedness and resilience
about.mission: To be the indispensable energy player in Senegal, by offering solar, electrical and thermal solutions that meet today's and tomorrow's challenges, while stimulating the local economy.
about.vision: To be a champion of energy development in Africa.
about.valueExcellenceDesc: We pursue the highest standards of quality in every project we deliver.
about.valueRigueurDesc: We apply proven methods and a high level of demand at every stage of our projects.
about.valueInnovationDesc: We embrace cutting-edge technologies to maximize the impact of our projects.
about.valueEngagementDesc: We are deeply committed to our communities, partners and the environment.
about.teamSubtitle: ERS relies on a multidisciplinary team of passionate and experienced experts in energy, engineering, project management and operations.
about.teamNote: Our team is growing. Additional team profiles will be published soon.
about.sabalyQuote: Operations is the rigor of daily work. Every megawatt produced is a promise kept.
about.sabalyCaption: Sabaly on site, in the Kahone power plant control room.
about.partnersSubtitle: A strong network of institutional, technical and financial partners
about.partnersIntro: ERS works with leading strategic partners, both nationally and internationally, to ensure the success and sustainability of its projects. They include public institutions, energy sector players, investors and technical partners. These collaborations strengthen our ability to develop ambitious projects and contribute effectively to the energy transition.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive expertise serving the energy sector
services.intro: ERS operates across the entire life cycle of energy projects, providing integrated solutions from development to operations, with high standards of performance and reliability.
services.developmentSubtitle: From identification to structuring of market-driven projects
services.developmentDesc: ERS handles the identification, structuring and development of energy projects tailored to market needs.
services.constructionSubtitle: Delivering reliable infrastructure on time and safely
services.constructionDesc: We deliver power plants while ensuring quality, safety and on-time completion.
services.operationDesc: ERS ensures the optimal operation of power plants to deliver reliable and continuous energy production.
services.productionSubtitle: Bringing energy to local and regional markets
services.productionDesc: We produce and monetize energy to meet the needs of local and regional markets.
services.maintenanceDesc: ERS offers comprehensive maintenance and operations management services to ensure the durability of installations.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: ERS develops and delivers structuring energy projects in Senegal, from design to operation.
projects.intro: ERS is part of an active drive to contribute to the energy transition and improve access to reliable, sustainable energy.
projects.kahoneDesc: The Kahone solar power plant is one of the major projects developed by ERS. With a capacity of 20 MWp, it is part of the national strategy for the development of renewable energies and represents a significant contribution to the diversification of Senegal's energy mix.
projects.kahoneDesc2: This project reflects ERS's expertise in delivering large-scale energy infrastructure, while actively contributing to reducing the carbon footprint and promoting more sustainable energy.
projects.kahoneImpactCo2: Tonnes of CO₂ avoided per year
projects.kahonePhotoCaption: Kahone solar power plant, aerial view, March 2024.
projects.niakharDesc: The Teranga Niakhar project is based on an innovative approach combining solar power production and a storage system. This integration improves the stability of electricity supply and optimizes the management of the energy produced.
projects.niakharDesc2: Through this project, ERS contributes to the development of modern energy solutions, tailored to today's challenges of grid reliability and performance.
projects.niakharInnovation: Major innovation: the solar-storage coupling ensures electricity supply even after sunset, addressing evening peak demand.
projects.nottoDesc: Teranga Notto Wind is a project based on wind energy, part of ERS's overall strategy to develop varied, reliable energy solutions tailored to the needs of the electrical system.
projects.nottoDesc2: Through this project, ERS confirms its commitment to supporting the energy transition by combining different production technologies to effectively address availability and energy security challenges.
projects.capDesBichesDesc: Teranga Cap des Biches is a dual fuel power plant, contributing to the diversification of production sources and the strengthening of the national energy mix.
projects.capDesBichesDesc2: This initiative is part of ERS's overall strategy to develop varied, reliable energy solutions tailored to the needs of the electrical system.
projects.otherProjectsIntro: ERS is also involved in the development of several complementary energy projects, contributing to the diversification of production sources and the strengthening of the national energy mix.

commitments.title: Our Commitments
commitments.subtitle: Contributing sustainably to community development and environmental protection
commitments.intro: At Energy Resources Sénégal SA, we place environmental and social issues at the heart of our activities, in every area where our projects operate. Our approach reflects a desire to contribute sustainably to the development of local communities.
commitments.approachDesc: At ERS SA, social responsibility is at the heart of our business model. Our projects are designed to create shared value, aligned with the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals.
commitments.communitiesSubtitle: Concretely improving the living conditions of local populations
commitments.communitiesIntro: We work actively to improve the living conditions of local populations by:
commitments.communitiesBullet2: Supporting job creation, particularly for young people
commitments.communitiesAgriDesc: We support farming activities around our sites by providing training and access to energy for irrigation and local food processing.
commitments.communitiesHealthDesc: Our health programs aim to improve access to healthcare in rural areas where we operate, in partnership with local health facilities.
commitments.communitiesEducationDesc: We invest in education through school support, scholarships and renewable energy awareness programs.
commitments.environmentSubtitle: Embedding environmental considerations into every project
commitments.environmentIntro: We integrate environmental considerations into each of our projects by promoting:
commitments.environmentCarbonDesc: Our solar power plants avoid the emission of thousands of tonnes of CO₂ every year, directly contributing to the fight against climate change.
commitments.environmentBiodiversityDesc: We integrate biodiversity preservation into the design and operation of our projects, in collaboration with local environmental stakeholders.
commitments.diversityIntro: We encourage equal opportunities and ensure that we:
commitments.diversityBullet1: Promote youth integration into the workforce
commitments.diversityBullet2: Develop women's potential through income-generating activities
commitments.diversityBullet3: Foster inclusive participation of local communities
commitments.diversityWomenDesc: We promote the employment and training of women in the energy sector, with a gender parity goal across our teams.
commitments.diversityYouthDesc: Internship, apprenticeship and first-job programs enable young Senegalese people to develop their skills in energy careers.
commitments.safetySubtitle: Ensuring health and safety wherever we operate
commitments.safetyIntro: We give paramount importance to health and safety by:
commitments.safetyBullet2: Raising awareness of best practices among teams and communities
commitments.safetyBullet3: Embedding QHSE standards across all our activities
commitments.safetyPolicyDesc: Our Health, Safety and Environment policy is aligned with the most demanding international standards.
commitments.safetyTrainingDesc: Every team member receives regular training on safety and risk prevention.

news.title: News & Insights
news.subtitle: Follow the latest from ERS SA and the renewable energy sector in Africa

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join our team
careers.intro: At Energy Resources Sénégal, we believe our success rests above all on the talents within it. We are looking for committed, curious people, motivated to grow in a dynamic environment.
careers.cultureDesc: At ERS SA, we believe the energy transition is built by passionate and committed talent. We offer a dynamic, inclusive and stimulating work environment where every team member contributes to positive and lasting impact.
careers.whyBullet1: A collaborative and stimulating work environment
careers.whyBullet3: A corporate culture grounded in respect and excellence
careers.expertiseIntro: We operate across several areas of expertise.
careers.benefitGrowthDesc: Continuous training and growth opportunities within a fast-growing sector.
careers.benefitImpactDesc: Contribute directly to the energy transition in Senegal and West Africa.
careers.benefitTeamDesc: Join a multicultural and passionate team in a collaborative environment.
careers.benefitInnovationDesc: Work on cutting-edge technology projects in the renewable energy sector.
careers.noPositions: No open positions at this time. Feel free to send us a spontaneous application!
careers.spontaneousDesc: Can't find the right role? Send us your application and we'll get in touch when an opportunity matching your profile becomes available.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are here to help with any project, partnership or information request
contact.formSuccess: Your message has been sent successfully. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: ERS SA attaches great importance to the protection of its users' personal data. This privacy policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal information in accordance with Senegalese Law No. 2008-12 on the protection of personal data.
privacy.collectionInfo: We collect data that you voluntarily provide through our contact and application forms: name, email address, phone number, message and resume. Browsing data (IP address, browser type, pages visited) may also be collected automatically.
privacy.purposeInfo: Your personal data is used to: respond to your information or contact requests, process your applications, improve our services and website, and comply with our legal obligations.
privacy.retentionInfo: Collected data is retained for a maximum of 3 years from the last contact. Application data is retained for 2 years. Beyond these periods, data is deleted or anonymized.
privacy.rightsInfo: In accordance with applicable legislation, you have the right to access, rectify, delete and object to the processing of your personal data. You can exercise these rights by contacting us at contact@er-senegal.com.
privacy.securityInfo: ERS SA implements appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, alteration or disclosure.
privacy.contactInfo: For any questions regarding the protection of your personal data, please contact us: Energy Resources Sénégal SA — contact@er-senegal.com — +221 77 604 12 37.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.intro: The ERS SA website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience. This policy informs you about the use of cookies and the means available to you to manage them.
cookiesPage.whatInfo: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device (computer, tablet, smartphone) when you visit a website. It allows the site to remember your preferences and recognize you on subsequent visits.
cookiesPage.typesInfo: Strictly necessary cookies: essential for the operation of the site (language preferences, session). Analytical cookies: help us understand how visitors use the site to improve its performance. No advertising cookies are used on this site.
cookiesPage.manageInfo: You can modify your cookie preferences at any time by configuring your browser. Disabling certain cookies may affect your browsing experience on the site.
cookiesPage.contactInfo: For any questions, contact us: contact@er-senegal.com.

codeOfConduct.title: Code of Conduct
codeOfConduct.intro: The ERS SA code of conduct defines the ethical principles and behavioral standards that every employee, partner and subcontractor must uphold. It reflects our values of integrity, transparency and responsibility.
codeOfConduct.ethicsInfo: ERS SA conducts its business with integrity and in compliance with applicable laws and regulations. We do not tolerate any form of corruption, fraud or unfair business practices. Every employee must act with honesty and professionalism.
codeOfConduct.respectInfo: We promote a respectful work environment, free from any form of discrimination, harassment or intimidation. Diversity and inclusion are pillars of our corporate culture.
codeOfConduct.environmentInfo: As a player in the energy transition, ERS SA is committed to minimizing the environmental impact of its activities and preserving biodiversity in the areas where it operates.
codeOfConduct.conflictInfo: Every employee must avoid situations of conflict of interest and report any situation that may compromise their impartiality in the performance of their duties.
codeOfConduct.reportingInfo: Any breach of this code of conduct can be reported confidentially through our whistleblower system. No retaliatory measures will be taken against a report made in good faith.

antiCorruption.title: Anti-Corruption Policy
antiCorruption.intro: ERS SA is firmly committed to combating corruption in all its forms. This policy applies to all employees, executives, partners and service providers of ERS SA.
antiCorruption.principlesInfo: ERS SA strictly prohibits all forms of active or passive corruption, influence peddling, misappropriation of public funds and illegal conflicts of interest. These principles apply in all countries where we operate.
antiCorruption.giftsInfo: The offering or acceptance of gifts, invitations or benefits that could influence a business decision is strictly regulated. Any gift exceeding a reasonable threshold must be declared and approved by management.
antiCorruption.thirdPartyInfo: ERS SA conducts compliance checks on its business partners and requires its subcontractors and suppliers to uphold the same ethical standards. Intermediaries are subject to enhanced due diligence procedures.
antiCorruption.sanctionsInfo: Any breach of this policy may result in disciplinary sanctions up to and including termination, without prejudice to criminal proceedings provided for by law.
antiCorruption.reportingInfo: Any employee aware of an act of corruption or attempted corruption must report it through the internal alert system. The confidentiality of the report is guaranteed.

whistleblower.title: Whistleblower Policy
whistleblower.intro: ERS SA provides its employees and stakeholders with a confidential reporting system to report any behavior contrary to ethics, the law or the company's internal policies.
whistleblower.scopeInfo: The reporting system covers: acts of corruption or fraud, violations of the code of conduct, environmental damage, situations of harassment or discrimination, health and safety risks, and any other serious violation of laws or regulations.
whistleblower.protectionInfo: ERS SA guarantees the protection of persons making a report in good faith. No direct or indirect retaliatory measures will be taken against a whistleblower. The identity of the whistleblower is protected and treated in strict confidence.
whistleblower.processInfo: Each report is thoroughly examined by the ethics committee. An acknowledgment of receipt is sent within 48 hours. The investigation is conducted impartially and appropriate corrective measures are taken if the facts are confirmed.
whistleblower.channelInfo: Reports can be made by email to: ethique@er-senegal.com. Reports can be made anonymously. All communications are treated confidentially.
